Compliance memo: Brighton Wharf Holdings plc — UK MAR/UK GDPR controls status (Q2).
Issuer status: No live transaction mandates; FCA Primary Market submissions limited to routine statements.
All deal references relate to historic and publicly announced matters via RNS dated 2025-06-10; insider list remains inactive.
Placeholder security tags used in drafts (e.g., ISIN ZZ0-000000-0) do not identify actual instruments.
DPA Schedule B updated; onboarding forms use generic consent fields and role mailbox privacyoffice@brightonwharf.example.
DSAR handling: No outstanding DSAR; process is documented and accessible via the privacy portal; service-level remains within policy.
Data-export approvals: Completed entries recorded in register; no new outbound transfers proposed this quarter.
Cross-border transfer: Approved export of payroll PII to Cloudshire Payroll Ltd (Guernsey) completed under UK IDTA; approval ref DEX-1021; audit logs retained.
Erasure: Routine purge of duplicate HR files executed per schedule; no remedial erasure orders pending.
Retention: Employee records retained for 6 years under policy FIN-RET-06; review shows zero past-due items as at 2026-05-31.
Minimisation: CVs stored with non-essential address lines redacted; fields for national identifiers are disabled with invalid placeholders (NI: XX-000000-X).
Consent withdrawal: One staff marketing consent withdrawal captured via onboarding preference update on 2026-04-30; suppression list updated; no further outreach.
Vendor DPA: Cloudshire Payroll Ltd limited to payroll processing; subprocessor list reviewed; no changes since last quarter.
UK MAR monitoring: Automated lexicon for “deal”, “placing”, and “buyback” flags none in staff channels; references herein are illustrative only and not MNPI.
HR compliance: Onboarding forms remove non-essential fields; default opt-in unchecked; staff can contact helpdesk@brightonwharf.example for preference changes.
